# Agent Stack

> Developer tools ranked by AI agent readiness.

Agent Stack ranks developer tools by how ready they are for AI coworkers. Each tool is scored across 5 dimensions, max 100 points.

## Scoring (5 pillars, 20 points each)

- MCP Server: official (20), community (12), none (0)
- Platform API: official (20), community (12), none (0)
- CLI: official (12) + json output (4) + non-interactive (4)
- Agent Skills: official (8) + skill file (4) + agent rules (4) + prompts (4)
- AI Docs: llms.txt (5) + OpenAPI spec (5) + AI quickstart (5) + copy markdown (5)

## Stats

- 68 tools ranked across 33 categories
- 8 tools with perfect 100: GitHub, Neon, Clerk, Stripe, PlanetScale, Render, Better Auth, Prisma
- Categories include: auth, database, deploy, jobs, email, files, messaging, edge, code, scraping, payments, cache, monitoring, search, voice, browser, memory, ai-search, compute-sandbox, saas-integration, and more

## Top 10

1. GitHub (100) - code
2. Neon (100) - database
3. Clerk (100) - auth
4. Stripe (100) - payments
5. PlanetScale (100) - database
6. Render (100) - deploy
7. Better Auth (100) - auth
8. Prisma (100) - orm
9. Vercel (96) - deploy
10. Supabase (95) - database

## Source

https://agent-stack.crafter.run
